description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff</color> from the target.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>. After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on enemies that have a <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>がある敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 보유한 적을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升\n<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使附带<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>的敌人陷入<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAt the start of the turn, removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> from the caster.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 시작 시 자신에게 걸려 있는 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 제거합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合开始时,解除自身附带的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。
